title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Cushman & Wakefield India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Cushman & Wakefield India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!
